title: RBAC Architecture
description: Mermaid layered diagram of role-based access control, showing users, roles with inheritance, permissions, and the authorization flow when a chatbot processes a query.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

learningObjectives: Explain how users, roles, and permissions relate in RBAC
Resolve a user's effective permissions through role inheritance
Trace the authorization-check flow for a chatbot query
educational.prerequisites: Basic understanding of authentication and access control

pedagogical.interactionType: Hover to reveal node descriptions; static authorization-flow panel
